3314860.name: Fantasy Grounds - Deadlands: The Weird West - Blood Drive Archetypes Set 3
3314860.description:
Deadlands: The Weird West - Blood Drive Archetypes Set 3

If you want to get your game started fast, this set of 12 archetype cards are for you! These cards contain a selection of iconic pre-made cowpokes to build a posse from or to use as handy NPCs in a pinch.The following (seasoned) Archetypes are included in this set:
  • Wrangler
  • Buffalo Hunter
  • Gun for Hire
  • Ranch Hand
  • Desperado
  • Pistolero
  • Wandering Preacher
  • Mysterious Stranger
  • Drifter
  • Tinhorn
  • Camp Cook
  • Ranger
Requires the Deadlands: The Weird West core book, and the Savage Worlds core rules to play. Archetype Set 3  may be used with any Deadlands: the Weird West adventure or Plot Point Campaign. This set was specifically created for
Deadlands: Blood Drive.
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Calum Mc Dermott
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and a one time purchase of the Savage Worlds Adventure Edition ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
